name: Pat Hynes
bio: Patrick (Pat) Hynes has served as Lyons Township Assessor since 2021 and brings 30 years of property tax experience to his challenge of incumbent Fritz Kaegi. He is also a firefighter and EMT. His campaign focuses on assessment accuracy errors he attributes to Kaegi's tenure. (Source: Ballotpedia Cook County Assessor 2026)

policy_platform.position: Challenges Kaegi's assessment methodology; argues inaccuracies have driven up tax bills for homeowners.
Supports clearer communication with property owners on assessment appeals and valuation methods.
Advocates for more accurate assessments to reduce homeowner over-taxation.

social_pulse.summary: Low social media profile. Cook County assessor race challenger with township assessor backing. No major national controversies.
